stemHtml: Overloading has the following effects on performance:

options.a: Increased take off and landing distance, increased rate of climb and increased fuel consumption
options.b: Reduced take off and landing distance, increased V<sub>NE</sub> and increased fuel consumption
options.c: Reduced take off and landing distance, increased V<sub>NE</sub> and reduced rate of climb
options.d: Increased take off and landing distance, reduced rate of climb and increased fuel consumption
